theme: Five Mistakes That Sink Incentive Trips

linkedin.text:
The trip didn't fail at the gala. It failed months earlier, on a spreadsheet.

After 200+ events, here are the 5 mistakes that quietly sink incentive trips:

1) Picking the destination before checking flight access — connections kill the mood.
2) Underbudgeting transfers — ground logistics is where trips actually fall apart.
3) Cramming the agenda until the "reward" feels like work.
4) Leaving dietary, accessibility and visa needs until it's too late.
5) No single on-ground producer for when something goes sideways. It always does.

Avoid these five and you're 90% of the way to a trip people remember for the right reasons.

Want a second set of eyes on your plan? Comment "REVIEW" or book a free call.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
We've produced 200+ events, and almost every trip that goes wrong goes wrong for the same handful of reasons. Here they are. 🧩

1) Locking the destination before checking flight access. Three connections and a 2am landing will sink the mood before day one.
2) Underbudgeting transfers. Ground logistics, not the gala, is usually where things unravel.
3) Overpacking the agenda until the "reward" quietly turns back into work.
4) Leaving dietary, accessibility and visa needs to the last minute.
5) Having no single on-ground producer for the moment something goes sideways — and something always does.

Avoid those five and you're 90% of the way to a trip people remember fondly.

Want us to take a free second look at your plan? Tell us in the comments, or send us a message.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #EventTips #MICE

image_prompt: High aerial of hundreds of incentive-trip guests boarding a fleet of coaches lined up along a sunlit Mediterranean harbour, tiny figures from above moving in orderly streams between vehicles, turquoise water and moored yachts along the quay. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
